allow: PowerShell(python -c "import ImageTextProcessorGemini; print\('import OK'\); print\('model:', ImageTextProcessorGemini.GEMINI_MODEL\)")

PowerShell(python -c "from google.genai import types, errors; types.GenerateContentConfig\(system_instruction='x', temperature=0, response_mime_type='application/json', http_options=types.HttpOptions\(timeout=90000\)\); types.Part.from_bytes\(data=b'x', mime_type='image/jpeg'\); print\('APIError:', issubclass\(errors.ClientError, errors.APIError\) and issubclass\(errors.ServerError, errors.APIError\)\); print\('signatures OK'\)")
